about.antvDescription: AntV is Ant Financial's new generation data visualization solution, dedicated to providing a simple, convenient, professional, reliable, and unlimited data visualization best practice. Thanks to rich business scenarios and user demand challenges, AntV has accumulated and polished over the years, supporting more than 20,000 business systems inside and outside the Alibaba Group, passing the rigorous test of products with tens of millions of daily UVs. We are working in various visualization fields such as basic charts, graph analysis, graph editing, geospatial visualization, and intelligent visualization. Welcome to join us.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: In the process of internal desktop applications development, many different design specs and implementations would be involved, which might cause designers and developers difficulties and duplication and reduce the efficiency of development.
introduction.summary: After massive project practice and summaries, Ant Design, a design language for background applications, is refined by Ant UED Team, which aims to
introduction.highlight: uniform the user interface specs for internal background projects, lower the unnecessary cost of design differences and implementation and liberate the resources of design and front-end development.
